text:
立body機motion is the 4th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

If the rōmaji in the title (立body機motion) is replaced with the corresponding kanji for the words (体 for body and 動 for motion), the resulting title would be , which refers to the ODM gear.

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-3:32) contains a melody (0:52-1:28 and 2:25-2:58) that is used as a motif in 進撃st-hrn-gt20130629巨人 (0:52-1:52). The second part (3:33-5:37) incorporates a melody very similar to the The Reluctant Heroes chorus (4:28-4:58).
